rows.notes: Adopted from gpt-5-mini, which correctly identified and extracted the page number '21' as a header. gemini-flash missed this row entirely.
Consensus across both extractors for this year header.
Consensus across both extractors for this account title header.

Adopted from gpt-5-mini which correctly identified this as a sub-section header with no associated monetary amount. gemini-flash incorrectly assigned the amount '80 3 6' to this line and designated it as an 'entry'. Visual inspection confirms no amount is aligned with this description.

Both extractors identified the description 'Total Receipts' and the amount '80 3 6'. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the row_type as 'entry'. Visual inspection confirms this amount is located in the *left* set of amount columns. Both extractors implicitly or explicitly misidentified the amount's column (gemini-flash notes refer to the 'right set', gpt-5-mini doesn't specify but implies the main right column flow).
rows.english_description: Total receipts for the dues compositions account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Total receipts for the dues compositions account, amounting to £80 3s 6d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified the description 'Balance from Gen Acct: I' (including the faint trailing 'I' mark) and the row_type. However, it incorrectly assigned the amount '1070 6 8' to this line. gemini-flash effectively missed this distinct row, bundling the '80 3 6' in the right column with the previous 'Total Receipts' description. Visual verification confirms the description 'Balance from Genl Acct: I' is associated with the amount '80 3 6' in the *right* set of amount columns.
rows.english_description: Balance brought from the General Account (first item).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance brought from the General Account (first item), amounting to £80 3s 6d.

rows.notes: Adopted from gemini-flash, which correctly extracted the description, amount, type, and confirmed the amount's location in the right set of columns. gpt-5-mini incorrectly used the description 'Balance from Gen Acct: I' (from the previous line) for this entry.
rows.english_description: Balance brought from the General Account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance brought from the General Account, amounting to £1070 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Adopted description, amount, type, and side from gpt-5-mini. gpt-5-mini's transcription of the description 'Balance from begining acc.t' is more faithful to the original handwriting (including the single 'n' in 'begining' and the abbreviated 'acc.t'). Its notes are also superior, addressing the clarity of the pounds value '5493'. gemini-flash also correctly extracted the amount but normalized the description spelling.
rows.english_description: Balance carried forward from the beginning account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Balance carried forward from the beginning account, amounting to £5493 3s 6d.

rows.notes: Adopted description, amount, type, and side from gemini-flash, which provided a more complete and accurate transcription of the total line's text and verified the arithmetic sum. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the amount and type but provided a truncated description ('L').
